title: Release: CHANGELOG entry + version bump rc.15→rc.16 + Gemini code review + coverage check (single batched task)
scope: CHANGELOG.md + package.json files (root + packages/*) + Gemini review pass
description: Single batched release task per memory/feedback_review_batching.md. (1) Add `## [2.0.0-rc.16] - 2026-05-15` section to CHANGELOG.md documenting both F2 (banner i18n: 6 banners now honor fabric_language across 4 variants) and F1 (`fab config` interactive panel replacing the rc.15 placeholder, scope = Group A+B+C). (2) Bump version from `2.0.0-rc.15` to `2.0.0-rc.16` in root package.json + ALL workspace package.json files (packages/cli, packages/shared, packages/server, plus any others discovered via `find packages -name package.json -not -path '*/node_modules/*'`). (3) Run Gemini code review (`ccw cli -p 'Review v2.0.0-rc.16 changeset for code quality, regression risk, and i18n correctness across the 8 task commits' --tool gemini --mode analysis --context '@CHANGELOG.md @packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/banner-i18n.cjs @packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs @packages/cli/templates/hooks/knowledge-hint-broad.cjs @packages/shared/src/schemas/fabric-config-introspect.ts @packages/cli/src/commands/config.ts'`) and triage findings — apply trivial fixes inline, file follow-ups for non-blocking issues. (4) Run full test suite + capture coverage report (`pnpm test --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared -- --coverage`); confirm coverage delta is non-negative for touched packages.

files.change: Insert `## [2.0.0-rc.16] - 2026-05-15` section above the rc.15 entry with two subsections: '### Added — F1 fab config interactive panel (Group A+B+C scope)' and '### Changed — F2 banner i18n closure (6 banners across fabric-hint + knowledge-hint-broad now honor fabric_language)'. Cite TASK ids per bullet.

implementation: Discover all package.json files: `find packages -name package.json -not -path '*/node_modules/*'` — bump every workspace package's version field
Verify cross-package dependency pins (workspace:* should be untouched; explicit version pins like `@fenglimg/fabric-shared: ^2.0.0-rc.15` MUST also bump)
Author CHANGELOG section with grouped bullets per task; link each bullet to its TASK-NNN id for traceability
Run `pnpm install` post-bump to regenerate the lockfile
Run full test suite — `pnpm test` from repo root — verify all green
Capture coverage: `pnpm test -- --coverage` and store summary in commit body or session folder for audit
Invoke Gemini review via ccw cli with the prepared context, parse output, triage findings into (a) inline-fix-now, (b) follow-up-issue, (c) accept-as-is
Apply (a) fixes, file (b) issues, document (c) decisions in commit body
Single semantic commit per the per-task=per-commit constraint: `chore(rc.16): release v2.0.0-rc.16 — Config + i18n closure (F2 banner i18n + F1 fab config panel)`

reference.pattern: Prior rc release commits (cf64a6b, 8643e06) for CHANGELOG section structure + version-bump scope; memory/feedback_review_batching.md for the batched-review rationale
reference.examples: Recent commit 8643e06 'chore(rc15): bump to v2.0.0-rc.15' is the canonical template — mirror its commit body structure and CHANGELOG bullet style

criteria: CHANGELOG.md contains `## [2.0.0-rc.16] - 2026-05-15` section with both F2 and F1 subsections, citing TASK ids
All workspace package.json files report `"version": "2.0.0-rc.16"` (verified via `grep -r '"version":' packages/*/package.json package.json`)
Cross-package pins (if any non-workspace:* deps reference rc.15) updated to rc.16 — verified via `grep -r 'rc.15' packages/*/package.json package.json` returning empty
Test command: `pnpm test` (full suite) exits 0 — anti-regression gate
Coverage report shows non-negative delta for packages/cli + packages/shared (the touched packages)
Gemini review findings triaged: each finding has inline-fix / follow-up-issue / accept-as-is decision documented
Behavioral expectation: rc.16 is releasable — version bump complete, changelog accurate, all tests green, code review concerns either addressed or explicitly deferred

rationale.chosen_approach: Single batched release task per memory/feedback_review_batching.md — running Gemini review + coverage ONCE at end is more efficient than per-task and gives a single coherent rc.16 audit trail
alternatives_considered: Per-task review + coverage (rejected: explicit memory contradicts this for multi-task lite-plan chains)
Skip Gemini review for rc release (rejected: F1 panel is a substantial new surface — code review valuable)
Split version-bump and CHANGELOG into separate commits (rejected: each task = one commit constraint, and these are tightly coupled artifacts)
decision_factors: Releasing rc.16 requires version-bump + changelog + test-pass + code-review as a single coherent gate
Gemini review at end has full context (all 7 prior task commits visible) — better signal than per-task review
rationale.tradeoffs: Single commit touches more files (version bumps across multiple package.jsons + changelog); offset by clear semantic grouping (chore/release scope)

manual_checks: Spot-check CHANGELOG entry for accuracy against actual commit log
Verify `pnpm install` succeeds after version bump (lockfile regenerates)
success_metrics: Coverage delta ≥ 0 for packages/cli and packages/shared
Zero unaddressed Gemini findings flagged as 'critical' or 'must-fix'
